ops.title: cookiesync is adding a native CDP path; getaway defers Arc CDP enhancer lanes until it lands
ops.body: cookiesync is adding a native CDP path (per user, 2026-07-13). getaway's background verify enhancers ship v1 with public + cookie auth lanes only; the token/device-wall lane (Arc CDP live-attach) is deferred until cookiesync's native CDP support lands, with the extension point documented in `skills/getaway/references/enhancers.md`. Do not embed gather.md's Arc-relaunch mechanics in enhancer docs. Related: [[arc-cdp-live-attach-balances]], [[cookiesync-arc-dead-peer]].
